title: UltraVision Task Record
description: One task in .UltraVision/tasks/<module>.jsonl (one JSON object per line). Source of truth is JSONL; markdown under tasklists/ is a generated view. IDs are deterministic and permanent.

id.description: UV-<MODULECODE>-<item-slug>-<step-slug> for templated tasks; UV-<MODULECODE>-<gap-or-area-slug>-<task-slug> for bespoke tasks. Deterministic: same inventory item + template step always yields the same ID, so re-expansion never duplicates.

title.description: One imperative sentence, unambiguous among 100k siblings.

description.description: Self-contained instruction. A fresh agent with only this record plus the module charter can execute it. Name files, functions, behaviors.

milestone.description: Bounded perfection tier defined in 08-QUALITY-RELEASE-PLAN.md (default ladder: M0 foundation, M1 MVP, M2 beta, M3 1.0, M4 vision-complete).

complexity.description: From the objective rubric: score context-needed, ambiguity, blast-radius, risk each 0-3; sum 0-2=C1, 3-4=C2, 5-7=C3, 8-10=C4, 11-12=C5.

complexity_scores.description: Optional per-dimension scores when a task overrides its template default.

model_tier.description: Delegation target. Default map: C1=haiku, C2/C3=sonnet, C4=opus, C5=fable (+controller review).

depends_on.description: Real blockers only. blocks[] is computed by tooling, never stored.

acceptance_criteria.description: Objectively verifiable. Something a verifier can check, not a feeling.

gates.description: Real project commands that must pass (typecheck, tests, telemetry audit, SMA gates).

paid.description: Paid services. Non-empty means execution requires explicit user approval (SMA cost policy).

prompt.description: Ready-to-run generation prompt. Required when paid is non-empty.

est_minutes.description: Effort estimate; drives critical-path weighting. Defaults per complexity: C1=15 C2=30 C3=60 C4=120 C5=240.

evidence.description: Required when status is done/verified. String = textual proof. Object = structured proof from `uvp complete --evidence-cmd`: {cmd, exit, ts, output_sha256, output_tail, text?} — auditable via `uvp audit-claims`.

verified_by.description: Set by `uvp verify` — separates the verifier from the executor.

lease.description: SMA brick lease id held for this task (set by `uvp claim --lease`, cleared on complete).

platform.description: Set when a template step fanned out per platform (modules.json product.platforms).

schema_version.description: Task record schema version (current: 2). `uvp migrate` upgrades older records.

spec_hash.description: 16-hex digest of the spec fields, stamped at expansion/migration. A mismatch at validate time flags out-of-band hand edits; template drift is surfaced by `uvp expand --dry-run`.
